title: Logical error: 'Expected the argument №1 ('__table1.constant_null' of type Nullable(Nothing)) to have 1 rows, but it has 0'
description:
`Important: This issue was automatically generated and is used by CI for matching failures. DO NOT modify the body content. DO NOT remove labels.`
Test name: Logical error: Expected the argument №A ('B' of type C) to have D rows, but it has E (STID: 2959-3bc4)
CI report: [Stress test (azure, amd_tsan)](https://s3.amazonaws.com/clickhouse-test-reports/json.html?REF=master&sha=6ea70d359e0c2d87d10dd5cb9bca56dfa8e98b25&name_0=MasterCI&name_1=Stress%20test%20%28azure%2C%20amd_tsan%29)

```sql
CREATE VIEW v
AS SELECT
NULL AS constant_null
FROM system.numbers LIMIT 10;
SELECT constant_null FROM v as l ANY RIGHT JOIN v AS r ON 1 =1  WHERE constant_null = 35;
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 10), (3, NULL);
CREATE VIEW test_view AS SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT value FROM test_view WHERE value = 10;
SELECT l.value FROM test_view AS l LEFT JOIN test_view AS r ON l.value = r.value WHERE l.value IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Expected argument to have 1 rows, but it has 0
